_doc: Jobs that were Running on MOCK-HOST at the moment PolicyRenewalWorker faulted. TWO distinct jobs, TWO distinct robot accounts (UIPATH\SVCINV, UIPATH\SVCMAIL) — both healthy and executing. This proves (a) the host CAN create sessions (rules out session-creation timeout), (b) the failing user's own account is not already running an interactive job (rules out single-interactive-job-per-user), and (c) exactly 2 sessions are seated — the workstation's concurrent-session ceiling — so PolicyRenewalWorker is the 3rd concurrent dispatch and is refused.
